title: Contact - Douglas Alexander MP for Lothian East constituency
text_excerpt: Contact - Douglas Alexander MP for Lothian East constituency Skip to main content Douglas Alexander MP for Lothian East constituency Join Get Involved Donate Homepage About Douglas News & Views Latest News East Lothian Courier Columns Media coverage In Parliament Hansard Parliament TV Voting Record Staffing & Other Costs Contact Privacy Policy More Menu Contact Contacting Douglas Assisting constituents with their problems and taking up concerns on their behalf is my number one priority. I have a constituency office and staff team based in Tranent to support constituents with this work. I hold regular advice surgery appointments to speak to constituents face-to-face and can also conduct these over the phone or online if preferred. Please contact the office to make an appointment by emailing douglas.alexander.mp@parliament.uk or calling 01875 816 221. Due to strict Parliamentary protocol I am unable to make representations for anyone who does not live within the Lothian East constituency. Please supply your full name and address when contacting me. The easiest way to contact me is by email: douglas.alexander.mp@parliament.uk Write to me at the following address: Douglas Alexander MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA (Please supply your full name and address) Douglas Alexander MP for Lothian East constituency Contact details Email: douglas.alexander.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Ryan Norton on behalf of Douglas Alexander, both c/o 65 High Street, Tranent EH33 1LN. ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
